label: "Reflection"
icon: "🪞"
---

## Reflection Pattern

<CodeBlock b64="" />

<Quiz question="What is the main risk of reflection loops?" options={["They always improve quality","They can over-optimize and lose the original intent","They are too slow","They require multiple models"]} correctIndex={1} explanation="Reflection loops can 'over-edit' -- the model keeps finding issues and revising until the output is technically correct but has lost its original clarity or intent. Set a max_iterations limit and check for convergence." />
